message:
feat(connectors): add GitHub Copilot Chat connector

- New CopilotConnector parsing VS Code Copilot Chat JSON sessions
- Supports turns, messages, and conversations JSON formats
- Detects VS Code, VS Code Insiders, VSCodium, gh copilot CLI paths
- Register in indexer factory and add copilot path detection to probe
- 11 tests covering all parsing formats and edge cases
- Close coding_agent_session_search-3dvu5
